Chito-Ryu Karate-Do

North Brook
Karate

Training for all levels and ages in Fredericton, New Brunswick.

Get Started

Why Chito-Ryu Karate?

Chito-Ryu Karate has a rich history, rooted in the ancient Okinawan styles of Shorei Ryu and Shorin Ryu. It was founded by Dr. Tsuyoshi Chitose, a medical doctor who brought his deep understanding of the human body to the dojo. He carefully refined traditional exercises and stances to ensure they were safe and healthy for every student. Dr. Chitose also believed that true self-defense should be well-rounded, incorporating throws and joint locks. Today, we’re proud to carry on his legacy, practicing Chito-Ryu as a path toward both better health and effective self-protection.

Our instructors have been training in Chito-Ryu karate for more than 30 years each, and bring deep experience and expertise to every class.

Safety & Self-Defense

Learn practical self-defense techniques in a safe, supportive environment.

Fitness & Endurance

Improve overall fitness, strength, flexibility, and endurance through training.

Discipline & Focus

Develop discipline, coordination, confidence, and perseverance that carry into everyday life.

Small Class Sizes

With intentionally small classes, students receive more individual attention and personalized feedback.
